I am CEO of Charles & Potomac Capital, LLC.  C&P is owned by and is the investment arm of the Connelly Family Office, Inc.
The Connelly Family Office is my employer.  Through its wholly owned subsidiary, Charles & Potomac Capital, holds most of the investments for CFO.
Eagle Sports Ventures/Friends of the Heights

Eagle Sports Ventures, LLC is a for-profit company that handled certain name, image and likeness payments and administrative costs for Boston College student-athletes.  It was renamed "Friends of the Heights, LLC" in December of 2024.  I resigned from the board of the LLC in January 2025.

Upon confirmation, I will resign from my positions with Connelly Family Office, Inc., and all subsidiaries, which include KBC Aircraft Leasing, Charles & Potomac Capital LLC, C&P Realty I, LLC, and Ropes Farm LLC. Ropes Farm LLC will be dissolved by May 15, 2025. I will not manage these entities or provide any other services to them during the period of my appointment. Instead, I will receive only passive investment income from these entities based on my financial interest in these entities. I will not  receive a business distribution. (/)

This is a second-to-die indexed universal life (IUL) policy with guarantees that offers the flexibility of Universal Life in regard to premiums and death benefit options. The primary difference is that the policy owner is allowed to allocate cash value amounts to either a fixed account or an equity index account, such as the S & P 500 or multiple indices. The index movement is generally calculated as a point-to-point percentage gain, but numerous other methods exist. It is important to note you are not directly investing into the market or an index. Beneficiary: Christine Freeman Popolo 2018 Family Trust.

This is a second-to-die universal life policy structured and funded to function as term insurance, intended to keep the policy in-force for a limited duration. Beneficiary: Christine Freeman Popolo 2018 Family Trust.
